content.problemStatement:
You are given an array A1A_1A1‚Äã, A2A_2A2‚Äã, . . ., ANA_NAN‚Äã consisting of NNN integers.

A subarray AlA_lAl‚Äã, Al+1A_{l+1}Al+1‚Äã, Al+2A_{l+2}Al+2‚Äã, . . ., Ar‚àí1A_{r‚àí1}Ar‚àí1‚Äã, ArA_rAr‚Äã is good if the sum of elements of this subarray is equal to an integer KKK.

Find the number of good subarrays present in the array.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain two integers NNN and KKK, NNN denoting the length of the array and KKK denoting the sum for a good subarray.
The second line of input will contain NNN integers A1A_1A1‚Äã, A2A_2A2‚Äã, . . . ANA_NAN‚Äã.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
The sum of the elements in all the different sub-arrays are as follows:

Sum of [A1][A_1][A1‚Äã] is 111.
Sum of [A1,A2][A_1, A_2][A1‚Äã,A2‚Äã] is 222.
Sum of [A1,A2,A3][A_1, A_2, A_3][A1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,A3‚Äã] is 555.
Sum of [A2][A_2][A2‚Äã] is 111.
Sum of [A2,A3][A_2, A_3][A2‚Äã,A3‚Äã] is 444.
Sum of [A3,A3][A_3, A_3][A3‚Äã,A3‚Äã] is 333.

As we can see, among all the sub-arrays, only the sub-arrays [A1][A_1][A1‚Äã] and [A2][A_2][A2‚Äã] have a sum equal to KKK. So the answer is 222.
